issues.detail: The skill file does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: scaffold-web-app-with-user-model
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A misses the required init command, migration command, and uses a different validator.

scenarios.name: add-session-authentication
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with sessionGuard, sessionUserProvider, auth.use('web').login, and middleware usage, while Response A lacks the required sessionGuard/provider syntax and uses auth.attempt instead of auth.use('web').login.

scenarios.name: build-token-api-with-pagination
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers all rubric items except the /api prefix, while Response B is incomplete and also lacks the prefix.
